motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 38/45 results (15/15 games). 25 running. PPO leads PQN 8-4-3. Dominates Phoenix (9x), NameThisGame (1.6x), Solaris (4x). Avg Q4=540.

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 34/45 results (15/15 games). 22 running. PQN dominates Amidar (16x), BattleZone (1.5x), SpaceInvaders (2x). Avg Q4=396.
